data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an emergency override, which allows a manager to force assignment. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality exists. The linked use case mentions the need for an emergency override, but there is no supporting evidence that this feature is implemented or operational in the current saga run.
gaps: No evidence of an emergency override feature allowing a manager to force assignment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for emergency override functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the manager can force assignment through the emergency override feature.
